recommendations.title: In the Lost Lands
recommendations.overview: A queen sends the powerful and feared sorceress Gray Alys to the ghostly wilderness of the Lost Lands in search of a magical power, where she and her guide, the drifter Boyce, must outwit and outfight both man and demon.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil
recommendations.overview: When a virus leaks from a top-secret facility, turning all resident researchers into ravenous zombies and their lab animals into mutated hounds from hell, the government sends in an elite military task force to contain the outbreak.

recommendations.title: Event Horizon
recommendations.overview: In 2047, a group of astronauts are sent to investigate and salvage the starship Event Horizon which disappeared mysteriously seven years before on its maiden voyage. However, it soon becomes evident that something sinister resides in its corridors.

recommendations.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
recommendations.overview: When scientists discover something near Antarctica that appears to be a buried Pyramid, they send a research team out to investigate. Little do they know that they are about to step into a hunting ground where Aliens are grown as sport for the Predat

recommendations.title: The Three Musketeers
recommendations.overview: The hot-headed young D'Artagnan along with three former legendary but now down on their luck Musketeers must unite and defeat a beautiful double agent and her villainous employer from seizing the French throne and engulfing Europe in war.

recommendations.title: Soldier

recommendations.title: Death Race

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: The Final Chapter

recommendations.title: Pompeii
